title: Senior Plant Manager at Jain Irrigation

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Jain Irrigation
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Jain Irrigation in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Jain Irrigation:
Jain Irrigation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jain Irrigation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
